title: Majestic Cream Beeswax Spell Candles - 11cm x 5.5cm (Pack of 6) - Long-lasting & Vibrant Decor, Magical Ambience – Perfect for Home & Office
features: VIBRANT MAJESTIC DESIGN: Our majestic cream beeswax spell candles offer a visually stunning and eye-catching design in a rich, bold cream color - perfect for creating an unforgettable atmosphere at any event or gathering.

ALLURING BEESWAX COMPOSITION: Made from 100% natural beeswax with a subtle, pleasing scent, these 11cm x 5.5cm candles feature a high-quality composition that delivers a long-lasting burn time of up to 1 hour.

MAGICAL AMBIENCE: Elevate the energy in your home, office,or any space with these enchanting candles, perfect for spell work involving love and courage, or simply to set an inviting and mysterious atmosphere.

IDEAL FOR ANY EVENT: Whether it's a romantic dinner, a spiritual ceremony, or just a cozy evening in, these versatile, non-toxic candles with 100% linen wicks provide the perfect decor solution for any occasion.

LONG-LASTING: These unique hand-rolled candles ensure an impressive burn time and may vary slightly in diameter to fit various holder types - making them a truly one-of-a-kind addition to your decor collection.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality candles designed with cream color engraved with honeycomb style. Safety Warning KEEP AWAY FROM FLAMMABLE MATERIALS. DO NOT LEAVE BURNING CANDLE UNATTENDED. MONITOR BURN TIME TO PREVENT DRIPPING. EXTINGUISH CANDLE WHEN LEAVING THE ROOM OR GOING TO SLEEP. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN AND PETS. PROPERLY DISPOSE OF CANDLE REMAINTS.
